data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will continue to bring hot weather to the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow. A trough of low pressure is expected to gradually edge closer to the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. There will be a few showers with chance of isolated thunderstorms over the region. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will still be a few showers over southern China early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260416","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South force 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
